headline: Olympia Financial Group Inc. Announces Sale of Olympia Currency and Global Payments Inc.
summary: Calgary, Alberta--(Newsfile Corp. - March 23, 2026) - Olympia Financial Group Inc. (TSX: OLY) ("Olympia") announced today that it has entered into an agreement to sell its wholly owned subsidiary, Olympia Currency and Global Payments Inc. ("OCGPI"), to Shift Connect Ltd. ("Shift Connect"). OCGPI is a boutique foreign exchange and global payments business providing customized currency exchange and cross-border payment solutions to individuals and small- and mid-sized businesses across...
